# Marketers Against Drunk Driving

> Using marketing for good. Helpful, plain-English guides, articles, and resources on drunk driving law (DUI/DWI), felony thresholds, choosing an attorney, prevention, and getting home safe. Built by an SEO who turned brand-building into social responsibility. Educational content only — not legal advice. Campaign hashtag: #marketersagainstdrunkdriving

## About
- [About — our story](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/about.html): How paying a ticket turned a marketer into a recruit, and why building this brand is social responsibility.

## Articles
- [Is Drunk Driving a Felony?](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/is-drunk-driving-a-felony.html): Is drunk driving a felony? Usually a first DUI is a misdemeanor, but it becomes a felony with injuries, deaths, repeat offenses, or a child in the car. Full breakdown.
- [Felony Drunk Driving Explained](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/felony-drunk-driving.html): Felony drunk driving means a DUI elevated by injury, death, repeat offenses, or a child passenger. Learn the penalties, charges, and long-term consequences.
- [Felony Drunk Driving in Texas](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/felony-drunk-driving-texas.html): Felony drunk driving in Texas (DWI) includes a 3rd offense, DWI with a child, intoxication assault, and intoxication manslaughter. See the penalties by degree.
- [Is Drunk Driving a Felony or a Misdemeanor?](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/is-drunk-driving-a-felony-or-misdemeanor.html): Is drunk driving a felony or misdemeanor? Most first DUIs are misdemeanors; injuries, deaths, repeat offenses, or a child passenger make it a felony. Full comparison.
- [Is Drunk Driving a Felony in Texas?](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/is-drunk-driving-a-felony-in-texas.html): Is drunk driving a felony in Texas? A first or second DWI is a misdemeanor, but a 3rd DWI, DWI with a child, injury, or death makes it a felony. Here is how it works.
- [Drunk Driving as a Felony](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/drunk-driving-a-felony.html): When is drunk driving a felony? Learn the aggravating factors — injury, death, repeat offenses, and child passengers — that turn a DUI into a felony charge.
- [Is Drunk Driving a Felony in Michigan?](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/is-drunk-driving-a-felony-in-michigan.html): Is drunk driving a felony in Michigan? A 3rd OWI is a felony, plus OWI causing injury or death and OWI with a child. See Michigan penalties and the lookback rules.
- [What Is Felony Drunk Driving?](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/what-is-felony-drunk-driving.html): What is felony drunk driving? It is a DUI/DWI elevated to a felony by injury, death, repeat offenses, or a child passenger. Definition, examples, and penalties explained.
- [Choosing a Felony Drunk Driving Attorney](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/articles/felony-drunk-driving-attorney.html): Facing a felony drunk driving charge? Learn what a felony DUI attorney does, what to look for, key questions to ask, and how the right lawyer can protect your future.

## Guides
- [How to Choose the Right Drunk Driving Accident Attorney](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/guides/how-to-choose-a-drunk-driving-accident-attorney.html): A free, interactive step-by-step guide to choosing the right drunk driving accident attorney — what to look for, questions to ask, red flags, and a checklist you can tick off.
- [Working With a Drunk Driving Lawyer](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/guides/drunk-driving-lawyer.html): What does a drunk driving lawyer actually do, when do you need one, and how do you find a good one? An interactive guide with a vetting checklist you can use today.
- [Hiring a Drunk Driving Attorney](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/guides/drunk-driving-attorney.html): When should you hire a drunk driving attorney, what will the process look like, and how do you pick the right one? An interactive step-by-step guide with a checklist.

## Resources
- [The 20 Best Drunk Driving Sites to Follow](https://marketersagainstdrunkdriving.com/best-drunk-driving-sites-to-follow.html): A vetted list of reputable organizations, advocates, and data sources on drunk driving and road safety.
